close_reason: Implemented tk sync on shell entry in buck2.nix enterShell hook. Added syncOnShellEntry option to configure.
description:
Run `tk sync` automatically when entering the devenv shell.

This ensures the workspace is always in sync when starting development.

Implementation in devenv enterShell:
```nix
enterShell = ''
  # ... existing setup ...
  tk sync --quiet
'';
```

Flags:
- `--quiet`: Only show output if something was regenerated

Should be fast when nothing is stale (just timestamp checks).
title: Shell entry: Run tk sync on shell entry
